## What Does This PR Do?

Brief description of the changes:

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change fixing an issue)
- [ ] New guardrail (new feature)
- [ ] Improvement to existing guardrail
- [ ] Documentation only
- [ ] Refactor / internal improvement

## Testing

- [ ] `bash tests/run-tests.sh` passes
- [ ] Tested on macOS
- [ ] Tested on Linux / WSL
- [ ] All test cases pass (show count: e.g., 140/140)

## Checklist

- [ ] No new external dependencies added
- [ ] `hapai.defaults.yaml` updated (if new config key)
- [ ] CHANGELOG.md updated with this change
- [ ] CLAUDE.md or README.md updated (if user-facing)
- [ ] Commit messages follow [conventional commits](../CONTRIBUTING.md#commit-convention)
